question: Will Dmitry Muratov be dead before 26 May 2026?
textDescription:
The question resolves YES if the Russian journalist and Nobel Peace Prize laureate Dmitry Andreyevich Muratov is credibly reported to have died before 26 May 2026, 00:00 Moscow Standard Time.

If he is known to remain alive, the question resolves NO.

Otherwise the question resolves N/A (e.g. if his vital status is unknown due to internment or kidnapping).
